exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.reason: Posterior-chain emphasis with lower rotational stress.

alternatives.name: Barbell Glute Bridge
alternatives.note: Use this if the hip thrust setup is busy.

exercises.name: Ball Leg Curl
exercises.reason: Hamstring work with controlled knee loading.
execution_notes: Keep hips up through the rep.
Reduce range if the knee feels irritable.

alternatives.name: Glute Ham Raise
alternatives.note: Use this if no exercise ball is available.
